note: 90s Tim POSED holding an open clamshell laptop in both hands. Used ONLY as the base for the laptop-hack core animation. Original pose IS Tim-with-laptop. Costume is the 90s look the user picked: brown center-parted curtained hair, magenta short-sleeve t-shirt with a chunky yellow pixel smiley face on the chest, light blue jeans, cheerful closed-lip smile. The laptop's visible lid BACK faces the camera and is solid matte-charcoal with a single small colorful pixel-art star sticker centered on it (the screen face is hidden — only a soft green glow on Tim's chin implies it). This base was generated via gpt-image-1 image-to-image edit (see /references/tim-90s-laptop-base-v4.png + @source). v1 (cmp1ar2gh0035doelku3kk18l, flannel + green-code-on-back) and v2 (cmp1c7k1j000b11w6v7ts8qr0, smiley tee but still green-code-on-back) are both retired.

laptop-hack.note: Cheerful 90s Tim holds the open laptop in both hands throughout; subtle two-hand typing motion, triumphant Enter-stab around frame 13, small approving nod toward the end. Both seams hit Original. Lid back stays solid matte-charcoal with the star sticker — no code visible on the back of the lid at any frame (the prior generations leaked the screen onto the wrong face). Soft green chin glow remains.

laptop-hack-v1.note: Retired. Generated from the flannel tim-90s-laptop character — read as sinister Hollywood-hacker because the green screen lit the face from below.

laptop-hack-v2.note: Retired. First pass with the cheerful smiley-tee costume, but gpt-image-1 painted the green code onto the BACK of the lid (geometrically wrong from this camera angle). Fixed in v3 by re-rendering the base with a solid matte-charcoal lid back + star sticker.
